steps.title: Compare the two areas
steps.content: The goal is to compare sizes, so the response must use the area data for both mountain ranges. The El Carmen-Verde Mountains cover 1,141 mi², while the Sierrita Mountains cover 63 mi².

steps.title: Keep the focus on size
steps.content: A is too general, C gives only regional information, and D defines sky islands instead of comparing the two ranges' areas. The answer is B.
